workflow.name: Post new Shopify products to Instagram, Facebook and X with OpenAI and Airtable
workflow.description:
Automate your social media marketing by instantly promoting new Shopify products. This workflow polls your store for new arrivals, generates AI-powered captions, and publishes them across Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter/X—while maintaining a deduplication log in Airtable.

---

## 🎯 What This Workflow Does

This workflow acts as a 24/7 social media manager, ensuring every new product gets immediate visibility without manual effort.

---

### ⏱️ Step 1 — Poll, Fetch & Deduplicate

- **Schedule Trigger:** Polls Shopify every 10 minutes for products published in the last 15 minutes  
- **Deduplication Logic:** Checks Airtable (`ProductPostLog`) to avoid reposting the same product  

---

### 🖼️ Step 2 — Data Enrichment & Media Hosting

- **Normalization:** Cleans and maps product fields (title, price, vendor)  
- **CDN Hosting:** Downloads product image and uploads via UploadToURL to generate a public HTTPS URL  

---

### 🤖 Step 3 — Platform-Specific AI Captions

- **Instagram:** Storytelling style, emojis, 10+ hashtags  
- **Facebook:** Conversational, CTA-driven, link preview optimized  
- **Twitter/X:** Short-form (under 260 chars), includes price and link  

---

### 📤 Step 4 — Multi-Platform Publishing & Logging

- **Instagram:** Create container → publish via Graph API  
- **Facebook:** Post image + caption to Page  
- **Twitter/X:** Publish tweet via native node  
- **Airtable Log:** Store status, timestamp, and image URL for tracking  

---

## ✨ Key Features

- **Intelligent Deduplication:** Prevents duplicate posts using Airtable log  
- **Sequential Processing:** Handles products one-by-one to avoid rate limits  
- **Custom AI Tones:** Tailored captions for each platform  
- **Reliable Media Hosting:** UploadToURL ensures valid public image URLs  

---

## 🔧 Setup Requirements

### Required Integrations

- **Shopify:** Admin API with `read_products` scope  
- **Airtable:** Base with `ProductPostLog` table  
- **OpenAI:** API credentials for caption generation  
- **Facebook & Instagram:** Page token with posting permissions  
- **Twitter/X:** OAuth1 credentials  
- **UploadToURL:** CDN hosting for images  

---

### Environment Variables

- `SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN`  
- `SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN`  
- `IG_ACCOUNT_ID`  
- `FB_ACCESS_TOKEN`  
- `FB_PAGE_ID`  

---

Ready to launch? Import this template and connect your Shopify store to turn every new product into a viral social media event!

parameters.content:
### ⏱️ Step 1 — Schedule Poll, Shopify Fetch & Deduplication
**Schedule Trigger:** Runs every 10 minutes — no webhook needed, no Shopify app config required.
**Shopify Node:** Fetches products published in the last 15 minutes using `published_at_min` filter and `status=active`.
**Split In Batches:** Processes each new product one at a time to avoid API rate limits.
**Airtable Search:** Looks up the product ID in the `ProductPostLog` table — if already found, the IF node skips it. Only truly new products proceed.

### 🖼️ Step 2 — Data Prep, Image Upload & Platform Split
**Set Node:** Maps and stores all product fields (title, price, URL, imageUrl, tags, vendor) into clean workflow variables — avoids repetitive expressions downstream.
**HTTP Fetch + UploadToURL:** Downloads the product image binary, then uploads it to your CDN. The hosted URL is stored back via another Set node.
**Switch Node:** Routes the enriched product data into 3 simultaneous branches — one each for Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter/X. Each branch is fully independent.

### 🤖 Step 3 — Per-Platform AI Caption Generation
**3 Separate OpenAI Nodes:** Each platform branch has its own dedicated OpenAI chat call with a platform-specific system prompt.
- **Instagram branch:** Emoji-rich, storytelling style, 10+ hashtags
- **Facebook branch:** Conversational CTA-driven copy, link preview optimized
- **Twitter/X branch:** Punchy under-260-char copy with price + link
This approach allows independent tuning of each platform's tone without shared parsing logic.

nodes.name: 📝 Note — Post to Platforms & Log to Airtable

parameters.content:
### 📤 Step 4 — Platform Posts & Airtable Result Log
**Instagram:** Two-step Graph API flow (create container → publish). Container ID from step 1 is passed to step 2.
**Facebook:** Graph API `/photos` endpoint posts image + caption to your Page.
**Twitter/X:** Native Twitter node posts the punchy tweet.
**Airtable — Log Results:** After all 3 posts, a final Airtable record is created/updated with `ProductID`, post statuses per platform, timestamp, and hosted image URL — prevents re-processing on next poll cycle.

assignments.value: ={{ $('Split In Batches — One Product at a Time').item.json.imageUrl }}

assignments.name: tags
assignments.value: ={{ $('Split In Batches — One Product at a Time').item.json.tags.join(', ') }}

assignments.name: vendor
assignments.value: ={{ $('Split In Batches — One Product at a Time').item.json.vendor }}

assignments.name: productType
assignments.value: ={{ $('Split In Batches — One Product at a Time').item.json.productType }}

nodes.name: Code — Fan Out to 3 Platform Items

parameters.content:
## 🛍️ E-commerce Product Launch — Auto-Post to Instagram, Facebook & X

**What this workflow does:**
This template polls your Shopify store every 10 minutes for newly published products. It checks Airtable to skip already-processed products (deduplication), fetches the product image, uploads it via UploadToURL, then routes each social platform through a Switch node — each getting its OWN dedicated AI caption generation via separate OpenAI message chains. Final posts go to Instagram (Graph API), Facebook Page, and Twitter/X, with results logged back to Airtable.

**Architecture Highlights (structurally different from Template 1):**
- ⏱️ Schedule Trigger (polls Shopify every 10 min) — NOT a webhook
- 🔁 Split In Batches — processes multiple new products one by one
- 🗃️ Airtable — deduplication log (checks + writes processed product IDs)
- 🔀 Switch Node — routes to 3 separate platform branches
- 🤖 3x Separate OpenAI calls — one per platform (Instagram / Facebook / Twitter)
- ☁️ UploadToURL — mandatory image CDN hosting
- 📊 Airtable — final post result logger

**Setup Requirements:**
1. Shopify API credentials (Admin API token with `read_products` scope)
2. Airtable base with a table named `ProductPostLog` with fields: `ProductID`, `Title`, `PostedAt`, `InstagramStatus`, `FacebookStatus`, `TwitterStatus`, `ImageURL`
3. OpenAI API credentials
4. Facebook Graph API token (pages_manage_posts + instagram_content_publish)
5. Twitter/X OAuth1 credentials
6. UploadToURL endpoint in the upload node

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
